mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO design_order_item ( order_id, rspu_id, rsku_id, variant_id, product_name, model, image_id, quantity, original_price, final_price, factory_code, snapshot_json, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.orderId}, #{item.rspuId}, #{item.rskuId}, #{item.variantId}, #{item.productName}, #{item.model}, #{item.imageId}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.originalPrice}, #{item.finalPrice}, #{item.factoryCode}, #{item.snapshotJson}, #{item.createdAt} )
